Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze an event log of Procure to Pay P2P process and identify anomalies in cases 1001 1002 1003 and 1004

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me recall standard P2P flow 1 Create Purchase Requisition PR 2 Approve Purchase Requisition 3 Issue Purchase Order PO to vendor 4 Receive Goods or services goods received usually against PO 5 Vendor Invoice Received 6 Match Invoice to PO and often goods receipt three way match PO receipt invoice 7 Release Payment 8 Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Standard order should generally be Create PR Approve PR Issue PO Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Sometimes invoice can come before goods especially for services but typically goods receipt should happen before or around same time and matching should happen before payment Payment should definitely happen after matching invoice verification and usually after goods received though there can be prepayments but that is not standard

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 Create PR Feb 1 0800 Approve PR Feb 1 0815 Issue PO Feb 1 0900 Receive Goods Feb 2 1000 Vendor Invoice Received Feb 2 1130 Match Invoice to PO Feb 5 0900 Release Payment Feb 6 1000 Close Case Feb 7 1500 This looks mostly standard Goods received before invoice This is normal

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 sequence Create PR Issue PO without approval Vendor Invoice Received Release Payment Approve Purchase Requisition Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is highly anomalous PO issued before PR approved approval comes after payment Payment released before goods received before invoice matched and even before PR approved Goods received after payment Invoice matching happens after payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is a major problem because it indicates control failure and payment without proper authorization or verification

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Create PR Approve PR Issue PO Release Payment Vendor Invoice Received Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Payment released before receiving goods and before invoice received So payment is made before invoice and goods receipt This is a major problem no three way match possible before payment match happens long after payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This suggests paying before verification which increases risk of incorrect payment fraud or paying for undelivered goods

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Create PR Approve PR Receive Goods before PO issued Issue PO Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Goods received before Purchase Order issued How can you receive goods against a PO that has not been issued This suggests unauthorized purchase or maverick buying or the PO was created retroactively

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The sequence is broken usually PO must be issued before goods can be received since vendor needs PO to deliver

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So summary Case 1001 Normal Standard Case 1002 Multiple severe anomalies missing approval before PO payment before goods invoice approval matching Case 1003 Payment before goods received and invoice received matching after payment Case 1004 Goods received before PO issued retroactive PO
